metadata.description: Local marketplace for agent-toolbelt Claude plugins.

plugins.name: gemini-public-inspector
plugins.description: Uses Gemini CLI for public URL inspection, prioritizing YouTube and Reddit.

plugins.name: everything-search
plugins.description: Uses Everything CLI for global filename and path lookup with safe fallbacks.

plugins.name: uvrun-python
plugins.description: Prefers uv for standalone local Python script execution with safe fallbacks.

plugins.name: yt-dlp-ffmpeg
plugins.description: Uses yt-dlp, ffprobe, and ffmpeg for public media download and local media operations.
